MAKE IN INDIA LOCAL CONTENT CONFIRMITY 
 
TO WHOMSOEVER IT MAY CONCERN 
 
 
We, M/S Voltriq India Pvt Ltd. Who are established and reputed manufacturer of 
Desktop Computers in India having office and manufacturing factory at A-7/B-1, 
Block A, Milap Nagar, Uttam Nagar, New Delhi, Delhi 110059 do hereby confirm 
the following. 
With reference the order issued by Department of Promotion of Industry and Internal 
Trade (DPIIT) Letter No. P-45021/2/2017-PP (BE-II). This is certify that we are the 
class 1 Supplier (As per the definition issued by DPIIT, Letter No: P-45021/2/2017-PP) 
and the local content in our product Voltriq More than 50%. 
 
 
 
Best Regards 
For Voltriq India Pvt Ltd. 
  
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Name: Vikash 
Designation: Vertical Head Govt & Retail sales   
Email: vikash@voltriq.in
